name: cep_not_flush_if_staged_del
drl: rule NE when not E0() P() then end
_finding: D-153 (staged-IF, the exists-arc discovery ported back): with the blocker alone in the initial window, NOTHING queues the executor (one-sided), so the InitialFact left sits STAGED at the not across epochs. ep1's [ins P1, ins P2, delete E0] + facts [P3,P4,P5]: the delete's force-flush drains [P1,P2] (rtm=[P2,P1]) but cannot unblock (no IF resident); the fire-loop eval drains [P3,P4,P5] and THEN processes the staged IF -> emission reverse([P2,P1,P5,P4,P3]) = [3,4,5,1,2]. The D-151 model (IF at fire 1) predicted [1,2,3,4,5]; the D-152 engine (in_cycle guard) FIFO'd. Graft: BfDump nb884x248.
